name: Spec · Numbers confidence card

do: white spec card centered on brand color background
dont: no decorative icons that hide the numbers

body: Amazon listing spec/confidence card for {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, 2000×2000 square. White rounded-corner spec card centered on a {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}} background. Card content: a 1-line headline in {{BRAND_FONT_PRIMARY}} (≤ 8 words) in {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}} text, followed by a single supporting line, then a horizontal row of 4-6 numeric data points. Data points come from: {{PRODUCT_DIMENSIONS}} and {{FEATURE_LIST}}. Each data point: big number in {{BRAND_PRIMARY_COLOR_NAME}}, small unit label underneath. Card has a soft drop shadow to lift it off the background. The composition reads as a designed spec sheet, not a stock infographic.

angles.name: Vertical stat stack
angles.description: Data points stacked vertically with horizontal divider rules.
angles.prompt_modifier: Layout shift: data points stack vertically, each row separated by a thin {{BRAND_ACCENT_COLOR}} divider rule. Each row: big number left-aligned, unit label right-aligned. Headline floats above the stack.
